case_title: GUILHERME ROSIN VS. AAA OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, NEVADA & UTAH

docket_entries.description: REMARK: EXHIBITS RECD VIA MAIL WITH REQUEST FOR ZOOM; AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR SUBMITTED BY DEFENDANT
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF **NO SIGNATURE** SERVED MAR-07-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AAA OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, NEVADA & UTAH

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-13-2022 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF GUILHERME ROSIN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AAA OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, NEVADA & UTAH, REPRESENTED BY LAKSHIM PAL, MEMBER RESPONSE ANALYST PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. NO EXHIBITS. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT AAA OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, NEVADA & UTAH
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT AAA OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, NEVADA & UTAH
(SC-109)AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR LAKSHMI PAL TO APPEAR ON BEHALF OF AAA FILED BY DEFENDANT AAA OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, NEVADA & UTAH
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ROSIN, GUILHERME AS TO DEFENDANT AAA OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, NEVADA & UTAH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-13-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROSIN, GUILHERME AS TO DEFENDANT AAA OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, NEVADA & UTAH
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM(DEFENDANT) **GRANTED**

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROSIN, GUILHERME IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AAA OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, NEVADA & UTAH DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
